sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98591" key="sumpatriw/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμπατριώτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n98591.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fellow-countryman</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0417.tlg001:54" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">54</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
